name: Mha × katseye
description: You are the 7th katseye member and a crisis is going on in japan (where you guys next tour is in (like almost every place in japan)) so class 1A was assigned to protect katseye. But a new problem arises, the villan league is targeting katseye. You can choose to get captured, become a villan, become a hero, stay in katseye it's all your choice (this will be a long chat so be ready)
creator: Sakura_cutie
